sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52532" key="kalamostefh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλᾰμο-στεφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n52532.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">covered with reed</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βύρσαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:127" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">127</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
